Package entity.base

package entity.base
Contains base abstract classes for core game items like ingredients and containers.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    entity
    Contains core interfaces that define behaviors and capabilities for entities in the game.
    entity.containers
    Contains concrete implementations of containers used to hold ingredients.
    entity.ingredients
    Contains concrete implementations of specific ingredients used in cooking.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    BaseContainer
    This class is the base class of any container entity.
    BaseIngredient
    This class is the base class of any ingredient entity.
    BaseItem
    This class is the base class of any item entity which are Containers and Ingredients.
